system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You strike your opponent in a precise spot between the eyes, reversing and disrupting the flow of Qi to the bladder. On a success the person’s fluids shift, causing body temperature to rise. This imposes a -1d10 to Reason Skill rolls for one hour per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic: In addition to the above effects, you lower the target’s Resolve by 1 per Rank of Qi and Dianxue. The points are recovered at a rate of one per day. This can also be used to reverse the effects of a Bladder Strike.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: In addition to the above effects, you lower the target’s Resolve by 1 per Rank of Qi and Dianxue. The points are recovered at a rate of one per day. This can also be used to reverse the effects of a Bladder Strike.
